channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump administration proposes 25% tariff to punish Brazil over trade practices
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US targets Brazil with new tariffs over trade practices
- Trump administration proposes 25% tariffs on Brazil, citing “unreasonable’’ trade practices
- US targets Brazil with new tariffs over trade practices
- US proposes 25% tariff to punish Brazil over trade practices
- Trump Targets Brazil With 25% Tariff, Citing Unfair Trade Practices]]>

item.title: UN warns possibly strong El Nino could push global temperatures higher
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- UN Warns Strong El Nino Could Intensify Global Heat Crisis and Trigger Extreme Weather Worldwide
- UN tells world to brace for extreme weather as El Nino looms
- UN warns world to prepare for El Nino extreme weather
- El Nino could push temperatures higher, UN warns
- UN Warns World To Prepare For El Nino Extreme Weather
- El Nino could push temperatures higher, UN warns
- UN warns of extreme heat risk from El Nino and urges preparedness
- UN warns of extreme heat risk from El Nino, urges preparedness
- A strong El Nino may be imminent. Climate change will make its effects worse
- UN warns of extreme heat risk from El Nino and urges preparedness]]>

item.title: Hundreds protest against planned US Ebola quarantine facility in Kenya
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Kenya protests over US Ebola centre turn deadly
- Kenya Protests Over US Ebola Centre Turn Deadly
- Kenya protests over US Ebola centre turn deadly
- U.S. Ebola Unit Plans in Kenya, Subject of Protests, Suffers New Setback From Court Ruling
- Kenyans protest US Ebola facility plan (PHOTOS/VIDEO)
- Kenyan president defends US Ebola quarantine center amid protests
- Hundreds of youths protest outside Kenya’s Ebola quarantine center for US citizens
- Kenyan president defends US Ebola quarantine center amid protests
- Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
- Protests over US Ebola site in Kenya kill two, court keeps block
- Kenyan president defends US Ebola quarantine center amid protests
- Protests over US Ebola centre in Kenya kill 2, court keeps block on site
- Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
- Two people killed in Kenya protest against US Ebola quarantine site plan, protest organiser and source say - Reuters
- Kenyan President Defends US Ebola Quarantine Center After Protests]]>
